new_text: Session 88 wrap-up (2026-02-16). Reconstructed lost Session 86 data. Deep 6-agent audit found 2 CRITICAL + 4 HIGH findings. Fixed C1: state.py negative timestamp bypass via double-sided clamp. Fixed C2: chromadb_socket unbounded buffer with 10MB cap. Optimized CLAUDE.md 964→851 tokens (-12%). Added 9 tests for Gate 13 (Workspace Isolation). Added FTS5 thread safety locks and 5000-char query cap. Updated statusline with session number, EXPECTED_GATES=15, EXPECTED_SKILLS=22. Tests 995→1005, Memories 398→401. Next: fix stats-cache memory_count gap, clean stale hook registrations, activate get_teammate_context, add ChromaDB degraded mode guards, cap metadata strings to 500 chars.

CLAUDE_SESSION_ID research (March 2026): No environment variable exists (GitHub Issue #25642 open, not shipped). session_id IS in stdin JSON payload on all hook events. No variable substitution in hook commands for session_id; only $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR and ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} substituted. Workaround: SessionStart hook extracts session_id from stdin and writes to CLAUDE_ENV_FILE. Torus approach: reads session_id from stdin JSON directly in Python scripts; state files named state_{session_id}.json for per-agent isolation. Key: session_id in stdin = YES, CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env var = NO.

Torus-pi-agent roadmap: 1. Add promptGuidelines to search_knowledge/remember_this tools (move behavioral rules from AGENTS.md to per-tool system prompts). 2. Add before_provider_request hook for automatic RAG; intercept API calls, embed recent context, auto-inject memories. 3. Add resources_discover handler for dynamic session context (summary file with recent memories, issues, gates, state). 4. Port causal chain tools (record_attempt, record_outcome, query_fix_history). 5. Port skills (/brainstorm, /fix, /implement). 6. Port analytics tools. Current: 17 gates + basic memory ported. Missing: skills, Loop workflow, causal chains, analytics, session lifecycle, dynamic context injection.

Session 372: Fixed 3 gate false-positive cascades. G14 greenfield bypass: new files skip pending_verification check. G6 scoping: ToolFail:X only triggers if X matches current tool. Mentor scoping: ToolFail:X≠Bash doesn't tank mentor score. Added npx vitest/jest to BROAD_TEST_COMMANDS. Root: WebFetch 404→ToolFail:WebFetch→G6 blocks Write→mentor drops→G19 blocks→death spiral. Fixed by scoping all 3 error_pattern_counts readers. GitHub sync as v2.6.5. Updated README: 213 files, 88K lines, 7 skills + 12 library, 5 MCP servers, 67 shared modules. G19 still problematic: mentor state persists across branch switches; enforcer may cache differently.

Added ~80 mentor system tests to test_framework.py: Tracker Mentor A (Signal/MentorVerdict/evaluators/_compute_verdict), Hindsight Gate B (registration/toggle/skip/GATE_DEPENDENCIES), Outcome Chains D (every-10th-call/stuck/churn/healthy), Memory Mentor E (UDS fail-open/context), Integration (schema/toggles). Two fixes: (1) fail-open test—mentor_evaluate(None,None,None) returns MentorVerdict not None; (2) churn test—Edit ratio <0.7 for churn to trigger (not stuck first at 0.7).

torus-web design-v2.1 merge: app/ai-gateway/page.tsx restored to functional version (real API calls to /api/admin/ai-gateway and /api/news, GatewayStats/NewsItem interfaces, useEffect, loading states, AIGatewayDashboard in My AI tab, copyEndpoint toast). Design version had static data only; functional version already had good visuals. app/esports/page.tsx needs: interfaces (DashboardData/GameStats/UserStats/NewsItem), useState/useEffect, connectSteam OAuth, API calls to /api/esports/dashboard, /api/esports/games-stats, /api/news, /api/esports/user-stats, selectedPeriod state for PlayerRankings.

Session 375: Fixed 3 gate false-positives. Fix 1—G14 greenfield: _is_new_file() check allows Write on non-existent files even if pending_verification non-empty (prevents cascade when creating multiple files). Edit not exempted. Fix 2—G6 scoping: ToolFail:X warns only when tool_name matches X (prevents ToolFail:WebFetch blocking Edit/Write). Non-ToolFail patterns still warn on any tool. Fix 3—Verification: added npx vitest/jest to BROAD_TEST_COMMANDS (vitest was scoring 30, below 70 threshold). Root: gates incorrectly block Edit/Write, Claude falls back to Bash (cat/cp) bypassing all gates. Solution: stop false-positives rather than gate Bash.

Gates Audit (2026-02-09, Session 8): 23 findings—0 CRITICAL, 3 HIGH, 8 MEDIUM (1 non-issue), 7 LOW, 5 INFO. HIGH: G5/G8 hooks/ exemption allows unverified edits to security; G2 exec safe exception with destructive payloads (python3 -c); G2 source safe exception allows arbitrary scripts if named 'activate'. MEDIUM: G1 missing extensions (.c/.cpp/.rb/.php/.sh/.sql/.tf); G3 missing deploy (helm/terraform/pulumi); G7 missing critical files (SSH keys, sudoers, .pem/.key); G7-4 non-issue (.env$≠.env.example); G8 hooks/ weakens temporal; Write-Bash bypass; weak verification in enforcer; verified_fixes unbounded growth.

Session 113: Gate optimization. G8 dormanted (late-night blocking disabled). G14 signal 3 dormanted (redundant with G4). G14 fixes: per-file counter, expanded exemptions (EXEMPT_EXTENSIONS), suppressed repeated warnings. Session nudges moved from G8 to tracker.py. Learning: G14 inspired by SuperClaude's ConfidenceChecker but signals duplicated G3 (test before deploy) and G5 (proof before fixed). 1043 tests pass.

v2.4.2 enhancements (Session 71): 5 features. (1) Confidence-aware memory search: thresholds >0.5 use, 0.2-0.5 verify, <0.2 unknown. (2) PDCA tag convention. (3) Research depth tiers (quick/standard/deep/exhaustive). (4) Hop patterns (entity-expansion, temporal, conceptual-deepening, causal-chains). (5) G14 Pre-Implementation Confidence: progressive (warn 2x, block 3rd), checks session_test_baseline/pending_verification/memory freshness (<5min), exempts test/config files/skills/ dir/re-edits. Files: CLAUDE.md, skills/research/SKILL.md, gates/gate_14_confidence_check.py, enforcer.py, shared/state.py, tracker.py, test_framework.py. Tests: 981 passed.

Task 3 (2026-02-09): Added 15 tests for G5-G8. G5 (3): unverified blocks 4th, same-file exempts, verification clears. G6 (3): verified_fixes check, never blocks, advisory warning. G7 (4): auth_handler blocked without memory, regular_utils passes, .env blocked, auth_handler+memory passes. G8 (2-3): long-session advisory during normal hours, skips 1-5 AM. Discovery: G4 fires before G7 on missing memory; test accepts either G4 or G7 block. Updated CLAUDE.md distinguishing blocking (1-5,7,8) vs advisory (6). Removed mcp.json from .gitignore. Created hooks/requirements.txt. Total: 103 tests (88+15 new), all passing.

Test infrastructure inventory (Session 221): test_framework.py (11,904 lines)—comprehensive gate testing, parameterized, fixtures, integration. fuzz_gates.py (562)—fuzzer for edge cases. benchmarks/: benchmark_gates.py (458) performance, benchmark_io.py (162) I/O latency. Shared modules: test_generator.py (533) auto-generate stubs, mutation_tester.py (811) kill rate/gaps, event_replay.py (708) regression. Tools: config_validator.py (320) validate settings/LIVE_STATE/gates/skills, integrity_check.py (97) SHA256 verification, skill_health.py (433) skill structure validation.

Added 15 smoke tests for 5 untested shared modules (test_framework.py lines ~11955-12100): event_bus (publish/subscribe/get_recent), metrics_collector (inc/set_gauge/observe via _store._data={}; _loaded=True), plugin_registry (scan_plugins/get_plugin None check), hook_cache (set/get within TTL, stats), secrets_filter (GitHub token/Anthropic key redaction, clean text). Key fix: MetricsCollector bypasses disk by setting _mc._store._data/._loaded after creation, using unique metric names (test.smoke.*). Note: test_framework.py crashes line 10062 (pre-existing ImportError: cannot import 'get_optimal_gate_order' from shared.gate_router); new tests unreachable until fixed. All 15 pass in isolation.

QualityCode gate created (zerobrain, 2026-03-09): File gate_quality_code.py, class QualityCode(Gate), tier 2. WARN_ESCALATION_THRESHOLD=4. Applies to code_execution_tool. Reads args["code"]/args["command"], skips <20 chars. Checks SECRET_PATTERNS—BLOCKS immediately (CRITICAL). Checks 5 debug patterns (print, console.*, debugger, import pdb, breakpoint): progressive enforcement via hash(code[:100])%10000 as code_key in agent_state["quality_warnings_per_file"]. Warns 1-3x, blocks 4th. Smoke: clean=allow, secret=block, debug print=warn×3 then block.

setup_extension.py CLI tool for non-gate extension hooks in settings.json. Commands: list, install <pack>, uninstall <pack>, validate <pack>. Settings: ~/.claude/settings.json, Extensions: ~/.claude/extensions/. _load_settings/_save_settings atomic via os.replace(). _load_pack reads pack.json. Install merges pack["hooks"] (deduplication by equality). Uninstall filters matching. Validate: 9 checks including gate resolution via _resolve_gate_path (handles dotted modules + relative paths; searches pack_dir then hooks_dir). ANSI on isatty(). Shebang+chmod +x. All 5 packs validate: cost-ops, quality, security, team, telemetry.
